ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., Twitter for Android) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "post_language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "post_sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical sentiment score of the post */,
  "post_engagement_score" REAL /* Numerical engagement score of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., None, Chicago, IL) */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is listed on */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Number of statuses the user has posted */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favourites the user has */,
  "account_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's account was created */,
  "user_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the user */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "user_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., depression, anxiety) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., mood disorders, anxiety disorders) */,
  "topic_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_topics" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mental health topic associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_features" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., sentiment, entities) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., sentiment, entity, keyword) */,
  "feature_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_features" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., user engagement, influence) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., engagement, influence) */,
  "feature_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "researcher_department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "researcher_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the researcher's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_access" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the post was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in minutes) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access (e.g., data analysis, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
